name: Two Step Cherry Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the lard and sugar until smooth.
2. Add flour, baking powder, and salt to the creamed mixture with milk, mixing well.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 8x8 inch baking dish.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: butter, 1/2 cup sugar, cherry juice, and water.
5. Spread this mixture over the batter in the baking dish.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 30-35 minutes or until set.
